goal: Screenshot this page. As a senior product designer, rate it /10. One-line verdict + one thing to improve. Dark SaaS dashboard.

action.criteria: As a senior product designer, rate this dark SaaS dashboard (Rewards page) out of 10. Consider: visual hierarchy, navigation clarity, active state indicators, empty state design, color contrast, typography, spacing, and overall professional polish. Provide a one-line verdict focusing on what works well and one specific thing that needs improvement.

steps.expectedEffect: Receive a comprehensive design evaluation with specific rating, verdict, and improvement suggestion for the Rewards page
